name: RuntimeOwner
notes: Planned owner of normal command execution; not default until oracle evidence says so.

name: ClientSlot
notes: Planned owner-loop representation of one connected client; owns query_buf, parsed argv staging, and a reply ClientWriteBuffer.

name: ClientWriteBuffer
notes: Planned per-slot outbound buffer drained by RuntimeOwner::flush_pending_writes; replaces direct Client::reply_buf flush.

name: RuntimeEvent
notes: Single ordered event channel from background subsystems into the owner. Variants enumerated below.

name: RuntimeOwnerConfig
notes: Typed knobs for owner-loop experiments; must not alter default behavior silently.

name: OwnerCommandResult
notes: Outcome of a single dispatched command inside the owner: Replied, Blocked, Closed, PendingMore. Replaces ad-hoc bool returns.

name: PollDriverHandle
notes: Abstract poller handle inside the scaffold. Concrete poller crate is TODO(human) and not picked in the scaffold packet.

name: SlotId
notes: Typed key into the owner's ClientSlot table. Must be a newtype around u32 (not a bare integer) so dispatch and RuntimeEvent variants cannot accidentally cross with db_index or replica_id. Referenced by the dispatch signature in harness/architecture/decisions/runtime-ownership.md.

name: CommandContext
notes: Existing command API; migration target must preserve normal dispatch semantics. Will eventually carry slot_id + &mut RuntimeOwner instead of &mut Client + &mut RedisDb.

name: RedisDb
notes: Existing DB state; owner-loop migration moves ownership from Arc<Mutex<_>> in databases.rs to Vec<RedisDb> owned by RuntimeOwner. No duplicate live DB models.

name: # RuntimeEvent variants (informational; not separate types). The single-channel
